sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n7643" key="a)na/tonos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνάτονος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἀνατείνω</etym>) <sense id="n7643.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">stretching upwards,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vitr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.10.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
